emails.subject: Questions?
emails.body: Questions? Who is Robert Mcgrory? Is he a member of the Legal Dept?

emails.subject: Questions?
emails.body: Questions? Who is Robert Mcgrory? Is he a member of the Legal Dept?

emails.subject: Re: Questions?
emails.body: Re: Questions? Hi Tana, Robert McGrory is Manager Regulatory Legal Services for Enron Australia Pty Ltd. I report to and assist both Rob and David Minns in our small but very functional legal department. Please feel free to introduce yourself to him I will ask him to do likewise. He returns from annual; leave on Tuesday 12 December 2000. If you have any further questions I can assist you with please do not hesitate to ask. Regards, Alison Keogh Legal Assistant Enron Australia Pty Ltd Ph: 612 9229 2316 Fx: 612 9229 2350 Tana Jones@ECT 07/12/2000 02:15 AM
